asset.title: L5 Large Range
asset.purpose: Silent workflow preview generated from app captures or trace replays. Judge whether it communicates the workflow and gate clearly.

judge.summary: A clear, step-by-step workflow preview demonstrating concurrency control and range locking on a 5-row window. The visual style is clean and legible, though highly schematic.

featureClarity.evidence: Demonstrates the 5-row window locking, reading, writing, and releasing sequence clearly.

workflowCompleteness.evidence: Shows the full progression from goal loading to lock release across 5 steps.

visualDesign.evidence: Clean dark mode layout with clear step indicators, though highly simplified.

consistency.evidence: Aligns with the agent-based row-level locking and versioning story.

evidenceQuality.evidence: Functions well as a conceptual trace replay, though it leans toward a schematic mock.

legibility.evidence: Text and status indicators are readable, though font sizes are small.

professionalRelevance.evidence: Highly relevant for developers understanding concurrency and CAS in large datasets.

productionHonesty.evidence: Accurately represents a simulated step-by-step trace without overclaiming.

observedEvidence: Row locking state change on Line 420
CAS write (+8.2%) and commit to V2
judge.suggestedReadmeCaption: Step-by-step execution of the L5 Large Range workflow, demonstrating row-level locking, CAS write, and version commitment within a 5-row window.
